flags.explanation: Naivas is a personal grocery supermarket. This looks like personal shopping paid from the business account.
flags.action_required: Move this to your personal account or reimburse the business.

flags.explanation: Personal parking fees should not be expensed to the business without a clear business purpose.
flags.action_required: Confirm whether this was a business trip. If personal, recode to owner drawings.

flags.explanation: An identical payment of Ksh 45,000 to Supplier XYZ was made on May 1st and again on May 3rd.
flags.action_required: Confirm with Supplier XYZ whether both payments are valid. Request a receipt for the second payment.

flags.explanation: A round Ksh 100,000 was paid to an individual with no invoice or reference number.
flags.action_required: Obtain a signed invoice or receipt from John Kamau before month end.

summary: 15 transactions reviewed for May 2026. 4 issues found: 2 personal expenses in the business account, 1 possible duplicate payment, and 1 undocumented round-number payment to an individual.
